channel.title: Inshop on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Working at Jimmy John's as an Inshop Worker: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A complete guide to working as a Jimmy John's inshop crew member — covering hourly pay, daily tasks, pros, cons, and tips for new hires.
